headline: 3 Ways to Grow Your Practice By Moving Out of Your Comfort Zone
summary: It isn’t enough to embrace change. By going a step further and seeking out challenges, advisors can grow their firms while more effectively serving clients.

headline: 3 Food Stocks With Big Yields. Why Wells Fargo Says Be Careful.
summary: Wells Fargo downgraded Conagra Brands, Campbell’s, and General Mills, warning inflation and sluggish consumption could pressure earnings even as their dividend yields top 6%.

headline: Shares of banks and financial services stocks are trading lower as the ongoing Middle East conflict drives oil prices higher and heightens inflation concerns, weighing on broader market sentiment. A stronger dollar and diminishing expectations for future rate cuts are adding further pressure on the sector.

headline: Fed chair pick Kevin Warsh meets with more senators as Thom Tillis blockade continues
summary: Sen. Tillis vows to vote against sending Kevin Warsh's nomination as Federal Reserve chair to the full Senate as a criminal probe of Jerome Powell is pending.

headline: How Might Stocks React After The FOMC's March 2026 Rate Decision?
summary: The Fed is expected to hold rates in March 2026 as CPI hits 2.4% and credit risks, oil, or tariffs impact bank stocks. Read more on the FOMC's decision here.

headline: How The Kinsale Capital Group (KNSL) Story Is Shifting As Growth Slows And EPS Holds Up
summary: Kinsale Capital Group just saw its fair value estimate trimmed from US$433.40 to US$422.40, a modest reset that puts fresh numbers around what some analysts think the shares are worth. That shift lines up with recent research that mixes confidence in profitability with caution around slower premium growth and sector headwinds, and has led several firms to lower price targets even while maintaining constructive views on execution. Read on to see how you can track these evolving calls and what...
